query: UPDATE sessions session SET recent_auth_token_digest = NULL, recent_auth_purpose = NULL, recent_auth_resource_id = NULL, recent_auth_expires_at = NULL WHERE session.id = $1 AND session.user_id = $2 AND session.security_version = $3 AND session.expires_at > now() AND session.recent_auth_token_digest = $4 AND session.recent_auth_purpose = $5 AND session.recent_auth_resource_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $6 AND session.recent_auth_expires_at > now() AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE users.id = session.user_id AND users.active AND users.security_version = session.security_version )
